   "reasoning": "I'm terrified that my family will make me drop out if they can't afford the fees, so I desperately need scholarships to stay in school. I also wish there were more teachers who actually cared, so hiring new staff and incentivizing the good ones to stay would be amazing. I don't really care about reports, I just want help to stay in school and make a better life for myself and my family.",
